title: Phone Column with Icons – Still Possible?
excerpt:

posts.author: fperera123 (WAP Dilhara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,
I noticed that the JustCall App on Monday.com has a phone number column with two icons (likely for call/text actions). I’ve been trying to replicate this on my own board, but I can’t find any way to add icons to a phone column.

Here’s how it is in the JustCall app video.

Screenshot 2025-04-17 at 14.22.29568×367 94.2 KB

https://callertech.monday.com/marketplace/v2/app/listing/10000177/JustCall

Is this still possible to do natively or via an app integration, or was this feature recently removed? Any insights would be appreciated!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve never seen icons like that in the phone column. I would think that’s something the integration/API with the JustCall app is adding. ie I use Aircall and I’ve recently learned that it doesn’t work unless the phone number has the +1 in front of it
